title: Malaysian Pork Ribs with Crumble Topping
description: A delicious fusion of Malaysian flavors with the comfort of pork ribs and a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together chili spice blend, sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork ribs to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Place the ribs in a single layer in a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
While the ribs are baking, prepare the crumble topping.
In a small bowl, mix together sour cream, breadcrumbs, and a pinch of salt.
Remove the ribs from the oven and top with the crumble topping.
Return the ribs to the oven and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the crumble topping is golden brown.
Serve the ribs hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
